mapper.sql: a.teller_code, a.teller_org_code, u.name AS teller_name, uo.name AS teller_org_name,
a.date, a.dp_org_code, lno.name AS ln_org_name, a.belong_org_code, blo.name AS belong_org_name, SUM (a.balance) AS balance
a.id, a.date, a.ln_org_code, lno.name AS ln_org_name, a.belong_org_code, blo.name AS belong_org_name, a.four_class_flag, a.five_class_flag, a.balance, a.ttl_received_int, a.day_received_int

a.ln_org_code, lno.name AS ln_org_name, a.belong_org_code, blo.name AS belong_org_name, a.four_class_flag, a.five_class_flag, round(sum(a.balance)/${avgDays},2) AS balance, round(sum(a.ttl_received_int)/${avgDays},2) AS ttl_received_int, round(sum(a.day_received_int)/${avgDays},2) AS day_received_int, #{startDate} AS start_date, #{endDate} AS end_date, ${avgDays} AS avg_days
